title: The Download: Claude’s inner workings and OpenAI’s “super app”
summary: Anthropic has gained new insights into Claude's internal workings through recent research on large language model interpretability. The article discusses developments in AI transparency and OpenAI's efforts to build a comprehensive AI-powered application platform.
content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Anthropic found a hidden space where Claude puzzles over concepts The AI firm Anthropic has got the clearest glimpse yet at what’s really going on inside large language models as they…

zh.title: 下载：Claude的内部运作原理与OpenAI的"超级应用"
zh.summary: Anthropic通过最近关于大型语言模型可解释性的研究，对Claude的内部运作机制有了新的认识。文章讨论了AI透明度的最新进展以及OpenAI建立综合性AI驱动应用平台的努力。

title: Sperm donors need limits, says a European fertility group
summary: A European fertility group advocates for limits on sperm donors due to issues with anonymous donation, illustrated by cases like Ties van der Meer who doesn't know his siblings. The concerns involve destroyed medical records and the broader implications of anonymity bans on donor identification.
content: Ties van der Meer doesn’t know how many siblings he has. The 47-year-old was conceived at a private fertility clinic in the Netherlands using sperm provided by an anonymous donor. After the Netherlands banned anonymous donation in 2004, the doctor who ran the clinic destroyed records that might have identified those donors, he says. He…

zh.title: 欧洲生育组织呼吁限制精子捐献者
zh.summary: 一个欧洲生育组织主张对精子捐献者设立限制，原因是匿名捐献存在问题，以蒂斯·范德梅尔等不知道自己同胞身份的案例为例。这些关注涉及被销毁的医疗记录以及匿名禁令对捐献者身份识别的更广泛影响。
